summary: David, what a week you're having! You've dropped 5.6 pounds over the past two weeks and you're now at 262.3 lbs—that's 52.7 pounds gone since you started, which is genuinely remarkable progress. Your current pace of 2.8 pounds per week shows the Mounjaro is working beautifully with your efforts. I noticed you logged 10 days this period, so next week let's aim for a complete 7-day log to catch any patterns that might help us fine-tune things even further. You're proving that consistency and the right support system actually work—keep leaning into what's working and stay proud of how far you've already come.
